channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Top of Kelsey Park sign missing, 6th March
item.description:
See photo. Top part (with park name) is missing and needs replacing please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DEAD FOX ON THE ROAD O/S No 15, 6th March
item.description:
Resident reporting there is a dead fox on the road it has been covered up by a clinical waste bag as there are young kids on the close and it will upset them as they walk past. Please could this get taken away asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turnpike Close, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Greese street, leading to Stephen street, 6th March
item.description:
Illegal road closure, not on council page.

item.title: Trees/bushes dumped on grass verge by pavement contractor, 6th March
item.description:
The pavement contractor who digging up the old asphalt and replacing it with tarmac, had to cut back the overhanging garden vegetation to do their job at this location. They then put it on the grass verge where it has stayed for the last 3 weeks, I assume that it will stay there for unless I report it! which I'm now doing, com some collect this please, thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kelsey Park - litter, 6th March
item.description:
Area needs litter picking please, litter under trees, in undergrowth, on grass - please tidy area. Https://w3w.co/launch.rash.vast

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned Car on Palace Rd, 6th March
item.description:
Black Toyota Prius with taxi stickers and only one number plate has been abandoned at the entrance to Palace Road for at least 6 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter every where Hoveton Bus Stop SE28 , Thamesmead., 6th March
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I would like to report an ongoing issue with littering around Greenhaven Drive, SE28 8FU, particularly near house numbers 31 and 32 and on the stairs leading to Hoveton bus stop. There is frequently rubbish scattered around this area, including on the steps and surrounding pathways. The stairs themselves are made of cemented material and are often very dirty and appear damaged in places. This creates a safety risk for residents and bus users as the steps can become slippery and may lead to accidents or falls. The stairs to Hoveton bus stop are used daily by many residents, including children, elderly people, and commuters travelling to Abbey Wood station. The current condition of the steps makes it unsafe and unpleasant to use. I kindly request that the council arrange cleaning and inspection of the stairs and surrounding area, and carry out any necessary repairs to ensure the safety of residents. Yours faithfully
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bertrand Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped., 6th March
item.description:
This hard rubbish has been here for over a month now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frazier Street, Waterloo, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Mattress bedding, 6th March
item.description:
Someone has left bedding on the stairs with lots of urine on the stairs, and food wrappers this needs to be cleaned as it is a safety hazard!! people could slip down the stairs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Latona Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose masonry / parapet instability, 6th March
item.description:
There's a large crack in the masonry on the top / roof section of this building with high likelihood that it could fall onto the pavement below if not repaired. This is more than 10m above the street and could cause serious harm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Westow Hill, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins on pavenent and road, 6th March
item.description:
Second time of reporting , houses facing Thames Road.Da1 Bins obstructing pavements and now being placed in road, difficult for wheelchair and pedestrians users to pass safely. Houses have driveways so why are bins on pavement?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maiden Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac surrounding gully drain completely gone, 6th March
item.description:
Gulley drain is now raised as the tarmac has completely come away hard to avoid as road is narrow could burst a tire on gulley drain surround.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
